results.prompt: Send a 30 minute Teams meeting invite to Megan Harrison tomorrow at 2pm about Deep Agents production readiness.

observations: tools fired: intentPlanner, assistantSourceHealth, calendarActionIntentRouter, createOutlookCalendarInvite, calendarActionFastPath
score.finalText:
I could not create the Outlook calendar invite. Nothing was sent.
Error: Outlook calendar organizer is not configured. Cause: createOutlookCalendarInvite needs organizerEmail or MICROSOFT_CALENDAR_USER / OUTLOOK_CALENDAR_USER / MICROSOFT_SYNC_USERS. Detection gap: the assistant previously had a calendar-looking widget without a real Graph execution target. Prevention: require an explicit organizer mailbox before creating Outlook invites.
